name: GitHub issue triage
description: Pull recent open issues from a repo, fetch context from a linked URL if present, and produce a triage table (priority / area / suggested action).
prerequisites: A GITHUB_TOKEN secret is set (PUT /api/secrets/GITHUB_TOKEN) for higher rate limits and private repos.
Replace the OWNER/REPO placeholder in the prompt with the repository you want to triage.

defaultJob.name: GitHub issue triage — OWNER/REPO
defaultJob.prompt: Use the github tool to list the 10 most recent OPEN issues for OWNER/REPO. For any issue body that contains an http(s) URL, call html_query to extract the page title and first paragraph. Produce a Markdown table with columns: # | Title | Area | Priority (P0/P1/P2) | Suggested next action. Be terse — one row per issue.
